name: r/d chicken flavor dry dog food
description: just like the human obesity epidemic, over 50% of the pet population is overweight. even a little extra weight can impact the pet's quality of life and relationship with family because that extra weight can reduce play time, impact mobility and affect the lifelong general health of your dog. 처방 유효 농도의 l-카르니틴 함량 용해성 섬유소과 불용성 섬유소의 최적 포뮬러 임상적으로 입증된 항산화제
